name: alchemy-codex-local-mode
description: Explicit local Codex-to-Alchemy image artifact handoff (development spike)

interface.shortDescription: Explicit local image-artifact handoff for Alchemy.
interface.longDescription: A disabled-by-default local development spike. Codex calls a local MCP adapter; it never becomes a Web provider or a CLI backend.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the explicit Alchemy Local Mode contract only when I request it, and stop if the image artifact cannot be handed off as a durable local file.
